title: The Salar Jung Museum Act, 1961
full_text: The Salar Jung Museum Act, 1961 सालार जंग संग्रहालय अधिनियम, 1961 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196126 Act Number: 26 Enactment Date: 1961-05-19 Act Year: 1961 Short Title: The Salar Jung Museum Act, 1961 Hindi Title: सालार जंग संग्रहालय अधिनियम, 1961 Long Title: An Act to declare the Salar Jung Museum together with the Salar Jung Library at Hyderabad to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its administration and certain other connected matters. Ministry: Ministry of Culture Enforcement Date: 01-07-1961 Notification: 1st July, 1961, vide notification No. G.S.R. 817, dated 15th June, 1961, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). Schedule 1.
